title: Aria subochracea
taxonomy: Aria subochracea belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. Aria subochracea is a deciduous shrub with white flowers and edible fruits. Its classification is further divided into the genus Aria and the tribe Pyreae. This species is closely related to other members of the Rosaceae family, such as apples and pears.
